title: Resolva 20300382 Pro Ready To Use Weed Killer, 1 Litre, Transparent - Packaging May Vary
features: Resolva Pro Weedkiller is a ready to use systemic weedkiller ideal for controlling annual and deep-rooted perennial weeds
This is for use on unwanted vegetation It can be used on beds, borders, paths, patios, driveways and waste ground
This products adjustable spray or jet trigger head feature allows for wide large area or targeted application
This pack will treat a 3.7 sq area (equivalent to 3.5 car parking spaces)
description: Product Description Resolva Pro weed Killer is a ready to use systemic weed Killer ideal for controlling annual and deep-rooted perennial weeds. It kills roots so weeds don’t come back. Resolva Pro controls grasses, including couch grass, Docks, Thistles, Nettles, dandelions, bindweed and many more weeds. Visible effects May be seen after 24 hours. Directions 1. Spray the weedkiller on unwanted vegetation. 2. Wait for 24 hours to see visible results. 3. Do not remove the weed until it's completely dead, ensure you leave weeds for at least 7 days before cultivating. 4. Planting can be done immediately in neighbouring untreated soil, taking care that new plants are not in contact with the weedkiller. 5. Resolva Pro Xtra Tough Weedkiller is broken down naturally and degraded by micro-organisms/microbes in the soil. Safety Warning Wait 24 hours before entering the treated area. Do not remove weeds until they're completely dead (at least 7 days). Be careful when planting in neighboring untreated soil to avoid contact with the weedkiller. Box Contains 1x Bottle of Weed killer See more
